name: Name
contato-descricao: Feel free to reach out or send me a message
contato-resumo:
Good ideas deserve great executions. 
If you have a project in mind, let's talk!
about-paragraph-1: I'm Ana Luiza, a Software Engineering student at PUC Minas with a strong passion for technology and innovation. I completed high school at CEFET-MG in 2023, where I also earned a technical degree in Biomedical Equipment. That’s where I was first introduced to programming—and I instantly knew it was the path I wanted to follow. Since then, I’ve been deepening my knowledge of system development through academic projects, working with various programming languages such as C, C++, JavaScript, and Java. I also apply agile methodologies like Scrum and Kanban, which help me deliver impactful results in team-based environments.
about-paragraph-2: I'm always interested in opportunities where I can apply what I’ve learned, gain hands-on experience, and continue growing as a developer. I’m a fast learner, naturally curious, and always ready to take on new challenges.

projects.title: projects
projects.subtitle: My works
projects.project-1-description: Digital platform for managing psychological practices that integrates session scheduling, communication between psychologist and patient, and emotional tracking, making the care process more organized and efficient.
projects.project-2-description: Web platform that centralizes VT Real’s financial and analytical management. The system automates savings calculations, integrates billing and usage data, and provides real-time dashboards, enabling more accurate analyses and better decision-making support.
projects.project-3-description: Web platform designed for people aged 50+, created to facilitate access to job opportunities and support adaptation to new technologies in the job market.

smallprojects.project-1-description: University hackathon management system built in Java using OOP, Singleton pattern and Streams API to manage teams, projects, judges and presentations.
smallprojects.project-2-description: Meeting room reservation management system for Xulambs Inc., built in Java to handle client registration, room booking, cancellations and management reports.
smallprojects.project-3-description: Bilingual professional portfolio built with React, featuring projects, experience timeline, exportable resume and integrated contact form.
smallprojects.project-4-description: Application to manage daily tasks with features to add, edit and delete.

job-description-1: Creates and maintains dashboards and intelligence reports for business insights and operational tracking. Monitors TechOps actions, backlog, and sprints, updates post-go-live projects daily, and tracks pre-go-live initiatives on a weekly basis.
job-description-2:
- Responsible for managing and maintaining data within the CRM (Customer Relationship Management) platform, ensuring accurate and organized customer and support records. 
Handle the registration, routing, and follow-up of technical support tickets for remote assistance, helping to ensure timely and effective issue resolution.
Act as a liaison between clients and the technical team, streamlining communication and contributing to continuous improvement in customer support.
